Localization.Description: Operations with virtual machine security groups

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: User {subject.account.name} could not unassign a security group from a virtual machine on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} could not assign a security group to a virtual machine on host {event_src.host}. Reason: {reason}.
User {subject.account.name} unassigned a security group from a virtual machine on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} assigned a security group to a virtual machine on host {event_src.host}
